theme.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) blended with subtle neon accents for AI
theme.description: Premium SaaS hybrid. Starts with a warm off-white light hero to build trust and accessibility, then transitions into deep, rich dark sections that mimic the product's actual dark UI environment. Incorporates Linear/Vercel aesthetic: high-contrast, crisp borders, and strategic glowing accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4.5rem] tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

navigation.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/20 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#6366F1] text-white px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#4F46E5] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(99,102,241,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#E4E4E7] px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center
buttons.dark_secondary: rounded-full bg-[#18181B] text-white border border-white/10 px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center

cards.light: bg-white border border-[#E4E4E7] rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm
cards.dark_neon: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#6366F1]/50 transition-colors
cards.ai_feature: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#6366F1]/30 rounded-2xl p-8 relative shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(99,102,241,0.1)]

badges.pill: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium bg-[#6366F1]/10 text-[#6366F1] border border-[#6366F1]/20

motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}
motion.tracing_beam: framer-motion animated SVG border tracing for AI feature cards

sections_blueprint.layout: centered text, visual overlapping bottom edge
sections_blueprint.content: Zukvo Logo in Nav. Headline: 'The Ultimate Work Platform for Independent Pros and Teams'. Subhead: 'Bid, manage, and scale your freelance business from a single command center.' Dual CTA. Huge product dashboard screenshot breaking the bottom boundary into the dark section.
Trusted by modern companies and freelance collectives.
Highlight Zithport Extension, BidIQ AI (with 'Zai' electric bolt), and One-click Convert. Focus on the AI Create modal and Sprint dashboard.
Project Workspace (Sprints, Tickets, Buckets, Bugs), Document Hub, Finance Suite, Daily Updates, RBAC Client Management.
Built for: Solo Freelancers, Freelance Teams, Companies. Distinct visual cards explaining value for each.
Solo Freelancer, Team, Company. Middle tier highlighted with 'Tracing Beam' glowing border effect.
FAQ accordion. Final 'Get Started' CTA. Massive 'ZUKVO' wordmark at the bottom (text-[10vw]).

testing.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, pricing toggles, accordions) MUST include data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI using pure HTML and Tailwind CSS for layouts, reserving Shadcn for complex interactive components (like tabs, accordions, and dialogs).

Implement the background color transition natively: start the page with bg-[#FAFAFA], then midway down apply a section with bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white. The hero image should overflow from the light section into the dark section to bridge the gap.
Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react. Avoid emojis entirely.
For the 'Zai' AI features, utilize the #6366F1 color and inner glow techniques to make it feel electric and premium.
Include a custom typography configuration in tailwind.config.js pulling 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts.
